title: disphyma australe
intro: Disphyma australe, also known as the ice plant, is a succulent plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Disphyma australe include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Disphyma australe include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Disphyma australe is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, salves, and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall skin health.
